suiteName: Start Planned Project Task - Functional Happy Paths

case.title: Start one task when multiple Planned tasks exist and verify others remain Planned
preconditions: Project '360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation' exists and has two or more Project Tasks with status Planned.

steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox

steps.targetDescription: Enter project name in Global search
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox
steps.value: 360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation

steps.targetDescription: Select matching project from typeahead results
steps.locatorHint: typeahead option matching full project name

steps.targetDescription: Project Detail page header is visible

steps.locatorHint: Related tab -> 'Project Tasks' related list link

steps.targetDescription: Verify more than one Planned task is listed
steps.locatorHint: status badges/text 'Planned' within Project Tasks rows

steps.targetDescription: Open one of the Planned tasks (click task name in a Planned row)
steps.locatorHint: Project Tasks list row with status 'Planned' -> task name link

steps.targetDescription: Project Task Detail page is visible
steps.locatorHint: record page header for Project Task

steps.targetDescription: Wait for status update to complete
Verify task Status updated to Started on detail page
Project Tasks list/table is visible again
Verify at least one other task remains in Planned status
steps.locatorHint: status badges/text 'Planned' within Project Tasks rows
